sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103329" key="tetra/grammos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετρά-γραμμος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, perh. <sense id="n103329.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">τετράγωνος, ὑποβώμιον</ref> </xr> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Inscr. gr.et lat. de la Syrie</tr_> <bibl n="Perseus:abo:pap,P.Flor.: i 153" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope"> i 153</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Cyrrhus</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
